registration_scope: Local pre-outcome lock; not externally registered.

amendments.reason: Corrected a two-character transcription omission in the portfolio proposal-manifest SHA-256 after the mandatory dry run rejected it. No pilot or evaluation simulation on any new confirmation task had started.

implementation.source_manifest_scope: All Python files under src/risk_shift_bench plus the seven experiment files named by LOCKED_EXPERIMENT_FILES in experiments/pilot_verified_evaluation.py.

blackjack_v4.construction: Complete ten-regime by four-risk-profile Cartesian product.

portfolio_v2.construction: Complete eight-regime by four-risk-profile Cartesian product.

inventory_v1.construction: Complete eight-demand-regime by four-operating-profile Cartesian product.

routing.candidate_screen: On the development split only, retain the single policy with the largest strictly positive mean score advantage over the domain fallback.
routing.proposal_rule: Five-nearest-profile exponentially weighted advantage prediction. Propose the screened candidate only when predicted advantage is positive and the task is no farther than the maximum support radius observed on the calibration split.

pilot.gate: Promote only when all requirements hold: seven nonzero batches, positive mean batch advantage, and exact one-sided sign-test p <= 0.01.
pilot.multiplicity_scope: The 0.01 threshold is per proposed task. No familywise claim is made; under valid per-task tests, the expected number of null promotions is bounded by 0.01 times the 59 fixed proposals.

evaluation.evaluated_policies: The deployed router, domain fallback, and the single fit-screened candidate.
evaluation.pilot_evaluation_separation: Pilot seeds begin at 20,000,000; final evaluation uses seeds 0 through 4.

inference.primary_estimand: Equal-domain mean of task-level relative score differences (router minus fallback, divided by max(abs(fallback score), 1)), after averaging five evaluation seeds within task.
inference.primary_test: Within-domain task bootstrap followed by equal weighting of the three sampled domain means; two-sided 95% percentile interval. A task-level sign-flip randomization preserves equal domain weighting.
inference.domain_estimands: Unweighted mean raw score difference within each domain; task is the inferential unit.
inference.multiplicity: Only the cross-domain relative-score estimand is confirmatory. Domain-specific tests, candidate comparisons, promotion counts, and fit-only proposal effects are secondary.

reporting_commitment: Report all three domains, all fixed tasks, every pilot rejection and acceptance, final harmful-promotion count, and the result regardless of direction. Do not retune after any pilot or evaluation outcome.
